title: RackTop Systems Collaborates with Seagate to Provide a Turnkey Solution for Active Defense Against Ransomware and Insider Threats
text: FULTON, Md.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--RackTop Systems, a leading provider of cyberstorage solutions which actively defend against ransomware and insider threats, today announced a collaboration with Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX), a world leader in data storage and infrastructure solutions that combines RackTop's revolutionary BrickStor Security Platform with Seagate's enterprise storage systems and drives.

title: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) Presents at UBS 50th Annual Global TMT Conference Transcript
text: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ:STX ) UBS 50th Annual Global TMT Conference December 6, 2022 8:20 AM ET Company Participants Gianluca Romano - CFO Conference Call Participants Timothy Arcuri - UBS Timothy Arcuri Good morning, thank you. Can you hear me?

title: Seagate Technology: Hard Disk Drive Weakness Still Not Over
text: We continue to be hold-rated on Seagate Technology Holdings plc. Seagate reported a 26% sequential decline in sales in 1QFY23 and a 38% Y/Y decline in HDD revenue, consistent with our concern about near-term demand weakness and customer inventory correction.

title: Seagate (STX) Expands Lyve Cloud Across UK to Reduce Data Costs
text: Seagate (STX) unveils that it is deploying Lyve Cloud storage-as-a-service in the U.K. that enables organizations to handle and move large amounts of data quickly and securely.
